title: Almond Tandus
description: A savory, crumbly Syrian dish featuring ground almonds in a gluten-free-friendly one-pot recipe cooked in the tandoor.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor to around 275°F (to ensure it's hot enough for baking).
Mix ground almonds, chopped garlic, salt, and a pinch of paprika in a mixing bowl.
Drizzle olive oil over the mixture and stir until evenly coated. Add pomegranate molasses and cumin seeds, stirring well to combine.
Transfer almond mix into the tandoor and let it bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from heat and serve warm.
